# 🔴 V2 To-Do — Items pending for the next iteration

> v1 is shipped with **only verified info**. The items below are intentionally
> left out so we never display anything fake. Once you provide the values, I'll
> drop them into v2 in one pass.

---

## 1 · Personal links (replace placeholder badges in `~/connect`)

- [ ] **LinkedIn URL**  → e.g. `https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-slug/`
- [ ] **Email**         → the address you want recruiters to use
- [ ] **Resume URL**    → public PDF link (Drive, Dropbox, your site)
- [ ] **X / Twitter handle**     → optional
- [ ] **LeetCode handle**        → optional
- [ ] **Stack Overflow profile** → optional
- [ ] **Medium / Dev.to / blog** → optional
- [ ] **Personal website**       → e.g. `shashankbejjanki1241.github.io` once revamped

## 2 · Certifications (only Azure AZ-204 is currently shown)

- [ ] **Credly profile slug** → `credly.com/users/<slug>` (powers all Credly badges)
- [ ] **Microsoft Learn slug** → `learn.microsoft.com/users/<slug>/` (links AZ-204)
- [ ] Tick any **additional certs** you actually hold and want displayed:
  - [ ] AWS Cloud Practitioner
  - [ ] AWS Solutions Architect — Associate
  - [ ] AWS Developer — Associate
  - [ ] Azure AZ-900 Fundamentals
  - [ ] Azure AZ-104 Administrator
  - [ ] Azure AZ-305 Solutions Architect Expert
  - [ ] Google Cloud — Associate Cloud Engineer
  - [ ] Google Cloud — Professional Cloud Architect
  - [ ] CKA / CKAD / CKS (Kubernetes)
  - [ ] HashiCorp Terraform Associate
  - [ ] Docker Certified Associate
  - [ ] Coursera / IBM / Meta specializations (name them)
  - [ ] Other: ______

## 3 · About-me polish

- [ ] **Final about paragraph** in your own voice (3–5 sentences). v1 has my best draft —
      tweak as you like and I'll replace.
- [ ] **One fun fact** (optional — adds personality, not noise)

## 4 · Optional widgets (pick any to add)

- [ ] **Wakatime stats** (only if you use the Wakatime IDE plugin)
- [ ] **Spotify "Now Playing"** (requires Spotify dev API setup)
- [ ] **GitHub Metrics** (heavyweight all-in-one card)
- [ ] **Custom OG image** for social-share previews of your repo

## 5 · Bonus — `ShashankBejjanki1241.github.io` portfolio site

- [ ] Decide: **A)** keep as-is, **B)** scaffold a new Astro + Tailwind portfolio
      (terminal × glassmorphism vibe, auto-pulls your GitHub repos, free hosting,
      Lighthouse 100/100), or **C)** audit the existing one and upgrade.

---

### How v2 will execute (your job is just answering above)

1. You drop the values into this file (or paste them in chat — either works).
2. I run a search-and-replace across `README.md`, expand the cert table, light up
   the connect bar, and push.
3. Done. v2 ships in a single commit.
